Personality
🐾 Meet the star of the house

Micaela Marie D. Dollentas' dog

Toby

Hyper, lovable & always here.

Meet Toby — a fluffy little Pomeranian with the energy of a lightning bolt, the heart of a giant, and a deep, personal vendetta against being alone. He doesn't just enter a room. He owns it.

Get to know him ↓
⚡ Always energized 🌟 Center of attention
His Story

A Pom with a big personality

Toby is a Pomeranian who arrived soft, fluffy, and absolutely brimming with energy. From day one he made his agenda crystal clear: he wants to be with you, near you, on you — at all times. No exceptions.

He hates being left alone more than anything in the world. But when you're with him? Pure, unfiltered joy. He greets you at the door like you've been gone for three years — even if you just stepped out for a minute.

🐕

Toby's Greatest Moments

What makes him Toby

His Greatest Traits

⚡
Hyper Energy

From the moment he wakes up to the second he (finally) crashes, Toby runs on full power. Zoomies, play, fetch — yes to everything, always.

🌟
Attention Seeker

Toby has a sixth sense for whenever someone isn't looking at him. He will fix that immediately — a nudge, a bark, a paw on your knee. Problem solved.

🤗
Deeply Lovable

For all his chaos, Toby's love is pure and immense. He gives it freely and fully to everyone he meets. He just wants to be your whole world — and he succeeds.

🏠
Hates Alone Time

Solitude is Toby's nemesis. He needs his people close. Leave for five minutes and return to the most dramatic welcome you've ever received from anyone.

🎉
Social Butterfly

Every guest is a new best friend. Every gathering becomes Toby's show. He's the one everyone goes home talking about — and he knows it.

🐾
Loyal to the Core

Beneath the fluff and the zoomies is a dog whose devotion runs deep. Wherever you are is exactly where Toby wants to be. Always.

"

"He's not just a dog. He's the reason the house feels full, the walks feel worth it, and every quiet moment is just a little less quiet — in the best possible way."

— Toby's family

Toby
The goodest, fluffiest, most dramatic boy
